must_activate_on: supplying an FR link/CSV/screenshot to interpret

engine_depth: fr_analyze emits per-band 量感 + a continuous tilt (warm<->bright + low/high extension) + a features[] peak/dip pass (sharp peaks/dips band-averaging hides, e.g. 8kHz sibilance, with perceptual hints). compare.py gives deterministic per-band + tilt deltas with a cross-rig guard. infer_target.py ranks SAME-RIG targets by RMS fit to guess a device's intended target. targets.json carries rig-tagged, confidence-graded targets (711/GRAS/5128) incl. JM-1, 5128 DF/FF, Harman OE 2013/2018, IEF, DF, and vince_iem_ref (Vince's personal IEM reference); values validated vs authoritative raw curves.
output_modes: long-form 评测长文 (~4000字, Chinese-primary, traceability appendix + backing evaluation.json)
source_orientation_model: Per-source 2-3 sentence style_profile + lean_tags; NO fixed faction enum. Orientation judged dynamically at search time: measurement-backed claims high-trust regardless of source; impression-led subjective + bias-corrected; dissent recorded.

control_boundaries.evidence_rule: every claim links >=1 source_id + provenance tag; dissent recorded
